Serviceberry plants in median Access: Public.

Multiple Juneberry/Serviceberry plants surround the Rave Cinema.  You can't walk into the building without passing them lining the sidewalk.  The delicious berries are ripe around June 10th. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
